message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.drop_columns (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.drop_columns():

- drop_columns_single: 3-col frame, drop one column "b" - retains "a" and "c"
- drop_columns_multiple: 3-col frame, drop ["a", "c"] - only "b"
  survives

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.drop(columns=...)), runs the Rust DataFrame.drop_columns(&[...]),
and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameDropColumns
was already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-p2cnp]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
